protection_class: unpacked-debug-pe (no packer on launcher; vanilla Unity 6)
imports_observed: 72 imports (KERNEL32 + UnityPlayer.UnityMain2), 4 exports (AmdPowerXpressRequestHighPerformance, D3D12SDKPath, D3D12SDKVersion, NvOptimusEnablement)
notes: Vanilla Unity 6.0.52f1 IL2CPP ship build. No third-party DRM visible. The GameAssembly.dll has substantial anti-debug primitives (~130 VMXON sites, ~87 CPUID sites, 57 RDTSC) but these are likely standard runtime-protection patterns, not third-party. Gap 25 (metadata v31 not supported) confirmed: re-il2cpp cannot parse this game's class graph statically. Unity 6 ships metadata v31, re-il2cpp supports v24-v29.
